children.heading: Maintenance of financial support
children.label: a Maintenance of financial support
children.text: The Secretary may require a trauma center receiving a grant under to maintain access to trauma services at comparable levels to the prior year during the grant period.section 300d–41(a) of this title

children.heading: Trauma care registry
children.label: b Trauma care registry
children.text: The Secretary may require the trauma center receiving a grant under to provide data to a national and centralized registry of trauma cases, in accordance with guidelines developed by the American College of Surgeons, and as the Secretary may otherwise require.section 300d–41(a) of this title
